title: Active Directory
overview: Before diving into Active Directory (AD), it’s important to understand the role of Directory Services in modern networks. Directory Services provide a structured way to organize, map, and control access to resources within an organization.

study.overview: Before diving into Active Directory (AD), it’s important to understand the role of Directory Services in modern networks. Directory Services provide a structured way to organize, map, and control access to resources within an organization.
study.whySoc: Use this note as an analyst reference: understand the concept, identify the relevant telemetry, pivot through evidence, and document the decision path clearly.
workflow: Identify the user, host, process, network flow, or identity object involved.
Collect the highest-value logs first and preserve timestamps and assumptions.
Pivot through related notes, telemetry sources, and MITRE references.
Document findings, gaps, containment options, and detection improvements.
